page_metadata.biotools__summary: De novo motif discovery tool for short linear motifs (SLiMs). Statistically over represented motifs within a set of protein sequences are identified and scored. Users have numerous masking options to control the contextual information to be analyzed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: De novo motif discovery tool for short linear motifs (SLiMs). Statistically over represented motifs within a set of protein sequences are identified and scored. Users have numerous masking options to control the contextual information to be analyzed.
